articles.title: White House Insider Admits Blacklisting RFK Jr. — Then Begs for Forgiveness
articles.summary: Former White House public health official Katy Talento confesses she deliberately kept Robert F. Kennedy Jr. out of policy discussions, now publicly apologizing as the truth about health agency capture becomes undeniable. A stunning admission of how the medical establishment systematically silences dissenting voices.

articles.title: Fauci's Deputy Greg Folkers Should Be Next in the Dock
articles.summary: As federal COVID indictments begin, Brownstone Institute names Greg Folkers — Fauci's longtime deputy — as the next target for prosecution. Folkers orchestrated gain-of-function research cover-ups and suppressed lab leak evidence for years.

articles.title: Psychiatry Refuses to Retract Fraudulent Paxil Safety Study Despite $3 Billion Settlement
articles.summary: Despite GlaxoSmithKline paying massive settlements for hiding Paxil's suicide risks, the psychiatric establishment still won't retract the original fraudulent safety paper. Patients get an worthless 'expression of concern' while the dangerous study remains in the literature.

articles.title: Cancer Research Giant Gets Retracted — Replication Crisis Claims Another Victim
articles.summary: A prominent cancer researcher faces retraction as the reproducibility crisis continues to expose decades of fraudulent oncology research. Meanwhile, paper mills are now advertising directly alongside IEEE proceedings, showing how deep the corruption runs.

articles.title: Strawberry Compound Reverses Aging — But Big Pharma Won't Fund Longevity Research
articles.summary: Fisetin from strawberries clears 'zombie cells' and restores youthful blood vessel function in groundbreaking studies. This life-extending research happens outside the pharmaceutical system because there's no patent money in natural compounds.

articles.title: FDA Hides Truth About Acetaminophen vs. Ibuprofen Safety
articles.summary: Despite acetaminophen being safer than ibuprofen for most people, the FDA's labeling rules prevent comparative safety information from reaching consumers. The agency's liability fears and per-drug mandate keep patients in the dark about which painkiller actually works better.

articles.title: The Vaccine Mandate Playbook: 170 Years of Medical Coercion Exposed
articles.summary: New book reveals the systematic pattern of vaccine enforcement through fear and legal coercion, from the 1853 Vaccination Act through COVID mandates. Documents how the 1955 Cutter Incident proved the dangers of rushed approvals — lessons deliberately ignored.

articles.title: Peer Review System Is Rigged — Here's How Independent Scientists Can Fight Back
articles.summary: Brownstone Institute exposes how the peer review cartel blocks dissenting research and protects establishment narratives. Offers concrete solutions for bypassing the gatekeepers who have turned scientific publishing into a censorship machine.

articles.title: White House Insider Admits: 'I Kept RFK Jr. Out — Now I Owe Him an Apology'
articles.summary: Former White House public health official confesses to deliberately blocking Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from accessing the West Wing. This admission exposes the systematic gatekeeping that prevented dissenting voices from challenging official COVID narratives at the highest levels of government.

articles.title: Top Cancer Researcher Hit With Major Retraction — What Are They Hiding?
articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher faces retraction amid growing evidence of fraudulent data manipulation. The systematic suppression of negative results and data fabrication in oncology research continues to compromise patient care and waste billions in misdirected funding.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Paxil Cover-Up: Journal Refuses to Retract Fraudulent Safety Paper Despite $3 Billion Settlement
articles.summary: Psychiatric journals maintain published studies claiming Paxil safety despite GlaxoSmithKline's massive fraud settlement proving the opposite. The medical establishment protects pharma profits over patient safety, issuing only a weak 'expression of concern' instead of full retraction.

articles.title: Strawberry Compound Destroys 'Zombie Cells' — Why Isn't This Front Page News?
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research shows fisetin from strawberries reverses vascular aging by eliminating senescent cells and restoring blood vessel elasticity. This natural longevity breakthrough gets buried while Big Pharma pushes expensive, ineffective anti-aging drugs with serious side effects.

articles.title: The Vaccine Papers They Don't Want You to Read: Historical Pattern of Fear, Coercion, and Cover-Ups Exposed
articles.summary: New analysis reveals systematic pattern of vaccine mandate enforcement through fear campaigns and legal coercion from 1853 to present day. The Cutter Incident and other buried scandals demonstrate how rushed approvals and corporate liability protection have repeatedly endangered public health.

articles.title: Federal COVID Indictments May Finally Crack Open Washington's Wall of Secrecy
articles.summary: Criminal charges related to COVID policies could force disclosure of suppressed government communications and decision-making processes. Years of FOIA stonewalling and classified pandemic documents may finally see daylight as federal prosecutors demand evidence.

articles.title: Fauci's Right-Hand Man Greg Folkers Should Be Next in the Dock
articles.summary: NIH Deputy Director Greg Folkers orchestrated key decisions in gain-of-function research funding and pandemic response cover-ups alongside Anthony Fauci. His role in suppressing lab leak evidence and manipulating scientific communications demands criminal investigation.

articles.title: Peer Review Is Dead — Here's the Brutal Truth About How to Replace It
articles.summary: The peer review system has become a corrupt gatekeeping mechanism that suppresses innovative research while protecting establishment narratives. Academic journals function as profit-driven censorship machines, blocking studies that threaten pharmaceutical and institutional interests rather than advancing scientific knowledge.

articles.summary: Former White House public health official admits she deliberately blocked Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from the West Wing, now acknowledging she was wrong to suppress his anti-establishment health agenda. articles.summary: New research shows fisetin from strawberries clears senescent cells and reverses blood vessel aging, offering natural longevity benefits. This groundbreaking anti-aging science gets buried while Big Pharma pushes expensive synthetic drugs with dangerous side effects.

articles.summary: Revolutionary research shows oral microbiome imbalances predict lifespan, frailty, cancer, and heart disease better than many expensive tests. This simple, accessible diagnostic tool threatens the medical industrial complex's profit model of complex, costly interventions.

articles.title: New Manifesto Exposes Century-Long War Against Natural Healing—From Flexner Report to FDA Persecution
articles.summary: 'Echoes of Courage' documents how corporations and government systematically destroyed holistic medicine, from the Flexner Report's medical school takeover to FDA raids on alternative practitioners. This historical exposé reveals the coordinated campaign to eliminate healing modalities that threaten pharmaceutical profits.

articles.summary: 'The Unseen War' reveals the historical pattern of vaccine mandates enforced through fear campaigns, from the 1853 Vaccination Act to Jacobson v. Massachusetts and the 1955 Cutter Incident. The book exposes how rushed approvals and corporate immunity create a system designed to prioritize profits over safety.

articles.title: Federal COVID Indictments Could Finally Break Washington's Science Secrecy Machine
articles.summary: New federal indictments related to COVID could shatter the wall of secrecy protecting government health officials from accountability. This legal breakthrough might finally expose the coordinated suppression of dissenting scientific voices during the pandemic response.

articles.summary: New studies prove strawberry compound fisetin reverses vascular aging and clears senescent cells more effectively than expensive pharmaceuticals. articles.summary: Groundbreaking research shows oral bacteria patterns predict lifespan and disease risk more accurately than conventional diagnostics, yet mainstream medicine ignores this accessible biomarker. articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher forced to retract key study amid fraud allegations, highlighting the systemic corruption in oncology research. The case reveals how prestigious journals and institutions protect fraudulent researchers while suppressing legitimate challenges to cancer orthodoxy.

articles.title: FDA Enables ImmunityBio's $2B Cancer Scam: Agency's Cozy Relationship With Biotech Exposed
articles.summary: ImmunityBio loses $2 billion market cap after FDA finally flags misleading cancer claims, revealing how regulatory capture allows biotech companies to defraud investors for years. The delayed action exposes the agency's systematic failure to protect patients and investors from medical fraud.
